scope: Technical software company building developer-facing products — ship small, well-built software fast with strong CI/CD and build pipeline tooling.
summary: CI failures are detected quickly but understood slowly: engineers wade through 10K–170K log lines with no pipeline-native root-cause narrative. Log aggregators search text; they do not explain which stage, dependency, or code change broke the build — driving burnout and context-switch tax.

signals.description: Mean time to diagnosis remains 30–60+ minutes per failed pipeline because relevant errors are buried in unstructured, cross-stage log noise; developers rely on personal grep heuristics.
evidence: Harness 2026 State of DevOps Modernization: 69% of engineers cite slow/unreliable CI/CD as burnout contributor
DEV Community / industry framing: failure detection is fast; comprehension (what failed, which change, what to do) is the bottleneck
Medium Feb 2026 CI triage article: 10K–170K log lines per failure; log tools collect but lack pipeline-structure-aware diagnosis
Level Up Coding May 2026: stage-aware log filtering cuts noise ~98.5% before analysis — implies massive default noise ratio
Datadog CI Visibility: compares failed vs prior successful runs to surface relevant log lines; uses LLM on last 100 relevant lines
arxiv LogSage (2025): CI/CD log heterogeneity and lack of actionable remediation guidance remain major industrial barriers
signals.opportunity_size: Large — every team on GitHub Actions/GitLab/Jenkins hits this; wedge is PR-scoped failure intelligence (stage + diff + fix suggestion) consumable in IDE or PR checks

signals.description: Emerging pattern: log-diff against last green run + stage parsing + LLM/heuristic classification collapses triage from hours to seconds — still fragmented across vendors and not IDE-native.
evidence: Datadog CI jobs failure analysis: relevancy via diff vs previous successful job runs
LogSage industrial validation: LLM framework for CI/CD failure detection and remediation guidance
Semaphore for AI Agents (2026): structured JSON CLI outputs for agent-driven pipeline diagnostics
Industry posts claim MTTD drop from 30–60 min to <5 sec with automated classification (pattern-based + AI)
signals.opportunity_size: Medium-large — incumbents adding features; opportunity for provider-agnostic layer tied to PR workflow

watch_items: False-positive rate of automated root-cause suggestions
